texto: Has society really become quite thin-skinned, or is acting “offended” a new tactic that is being used to shut down legitimate political debate? Progressives are increasingly claiming to be offended whenever those on the right disagree with their left-wing positions. It doesn't matter what the issue is; the left will divert a legitimate political debate into an accusation that the right disagrees with them because they are full of hate towards them.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Rachel Alexander que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Has society really become quite thin-skinned, or is acting “offended” a new tactic that is being …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sucesso, left, leftwing, com foco em termino e leftwing.
